concerns.text: Task T005 explicitly excludes ChestX-ray14 per Plan, but the Spec (FR-003) and Constitution (Principle VI) mandate its inclusion. The task silently weakens a constitutional requirement without a formal spec amendment or explicit 'staged' flag in the task description.

Task T021 implements comparison against 'native 1024x1024 ground truth' and notes deviation from Spec FR-004. However, FR-004 mandates 'bilinearly upsampled 64x64 ground truth'. The task executes a scientifically sound alternative but fails to explicitly state it is overriding a constitutional/spec requirement, risking silent constraint drift.

Task T022 implements 'paired t-test/Wilcoxon' and notes deviation from Spec SC-005 ('one-sample t-test'). While the Plan amends this, the task description must explicitly reference the Plan Amendment ID or Constitution Principle to justify overriding the Spec's statistical method, preventing silent weakening of the defined success criteria.

Task T019 processes 'ImageNet-1K and COCO' but the Spec (US-2) and Constitution (Principle VI) require 'ImageNet-1K and ChestX-ray14'. The task omits the mandated dataset without a clear 'Amended per Plan' tag in the task body, creating a semantic gap between the Spec's acceptance criteria and the Task's deliverable.
